introSection:
Crazy Caterpillar is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Bayside Fun Park in Bridlington, East Riding of Yorkshire, England, UK.

It is located where the Grand Canyon stood previously. Green track. Between 2014 and 2017, the supports were painted yellow. Previously they were unpainted.
fullText:
Crazy Caterpillar is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Bayside Fun Park in Bridlington, East Riding of Yorkshire, England, UK.

It is located where the Grand Canyon stood previously. Green track. Between 2014 and 2017, the supports were painted yellow. Previously they were unpainted.
